title: 目標達成の後に・春雷を目指して

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer, let's start plannin' our next
steps right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross has found success in a number of
graded races and is now ready to progress toward
her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Tell it to me straight. My body...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Is it good enough for the big leagues yet? Am I
ready for the G1 races?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All RIIIGHT! Startin' today, nobody's lookin' down on me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's payback time, and I'm collectin' with interest. This year, I'm gonna win, win, and win some more!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. There's this one race I really
want to run in. I just have to be there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho! My dad always says...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Yep, there's no race that better represents the
G1 than the spring Tenno Sho. The Derby's nice 'n
all, but up against the Tenno Sho? No contest.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
That race's been goin' on for decades. And I've
been watchin' it since I was a tyke myself. Never
fails to give me chills... I love that race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
The thought of my little Tama runnin' in that
race... Why, it almost makes a grown man cry.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The Tenno Sho means a helluva lot to my dad...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And after everythin' he's done for me, I wanna do
right by him. I'll stop at nothin' to enter that
race... That okay with you?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, for real?! I owe ya big time! Now I can't
wait to call the fam tonight!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I bet Pop's gonna jump for joy when he hears
about this! I'm real glad I made it in time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is over the moon. Unfortunately,
there's an issue...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? You're gonna get wrinkles
with a frown like that.
choice_data_list: The distance could be a problem.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The distance? Ya saying 3,200 meters is too
much for me?
choice_data_list:
I think you have the aptitude for it, but we'll
need experience too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pacing and strategy needed for two laps
around a course is completely different from what
a single lap calls for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to get in at least one more long-distance
race before the big event. Which is why...
choice_data_list:
We should compete in the G2 Hanshin
Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The Hanshin Daishoten... Isn't that race 3,000
meters? And it's held in Kansai too. My home
turf...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A'ight! Let's have us a little homecomin' before
the big day. After that, we can hit the road for
Kyoto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set our sights on our first senior-level
race, the Hanshin Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: By the way, ya free after this, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's a race happenin' this afternoon. A race
that just so happens to feature you-know-who.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race in question turns out to be...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Go, go, GOOO! Leave 'em in da dust, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And it's Oguri Cap! Oguri Cap takes the win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: This Umamusume may be from the countryside, but her speed's nothing short of explosive! We just got a glimpse of some terrifying talent!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Didja see that, Trainer? There's no stoppin' that girl! She used to be a fish outta water, but now she's got her land legs, and those legs are fast!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
As her more experienced friend, I gotta keep
watch over her. If anythin' happens, I'll be needin'
your help.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still... That was some performance she put on. I
dunno, it's almost like...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Even though she's got a very down-to-earth vibe,
there's this flower blooming inside her... When
she's racin', ya just can't look away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look over at Oguri Cap, who looks relieved to
have won. I have to agree with Tamamo
Cross—beyond her strength, something else
about her running just... pulls you in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not sure how to put that feeling into
words... For now, we'll just have to focus on the
Hanshin Daishoten.
